security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Pack any project into LLM-ready text, respecting .gitignore
bundle.longDescription: ProjectToText (ptt) is a git-native desktop app that turns folders into high-quality XML/Markdown/JSON context for LLMs. It respects .gitignore exactly like Git and supports .pttignore for extra exclusions.
